chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2974 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.15723/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A. No.15724/2025 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 29.10.2025 Mr. Raza Hussain Shar, Advocate for Applicants a/w applicants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Waseem Ali Memon son of Rasool Bux, Mst. Niyamat Khatoon wife of Rasool Bux Memon and Moon Ali son of Rasool Bux Memon seek protective bail in FIR No.370/2025 under Section- 324/34/506-B PPC, registered at P.S Moro, Naushehro Feroz. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicants/accused are innocent and have been falsely implicated with malafide intention; that the applicants intend to surrender before the trial Court for their bail but apprehend of their arrest, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are granted protective bail for a period of 10 days from today i.e 29.10.2025 to 07.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees Twenty Thousand Only) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicants are directed to surrender before the trial Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 10 days period i.e. 07.11.2025 or when the Applicants surrender themselves before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier.

The applicants are directed to surrender before the trial Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 10 days period i.e. 07.11.2025 or when the Applicants surrender themselves before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicants fail to make their appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
